title: culcitium lineare
intro: Culcitium lineare, also known as the linear culcitium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caprifoliaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Culcitium lineare can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to utilize its medicinal and health benefits.
